ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-23-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAR-14-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GENERAL MOTORS ACCEPTANCE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, KATIE SMITH, LAWRENCE $5,902.75 PRINCIPAL, $925.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,636.95 INTEREST, $188.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,652.70, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-23-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
